meta.title: Botanical Wallpaper for Living Rooms
meta.description: Wallpaper pages matching style x room intent

seo.description_template: Shop {style} wallpaper for {room}s. {product_count}+ designs, {currency} pricing, expert tips for {market}.

generation.system_prompt: You are an interior design and SEO expert. Return ONLY valid JSON matching the output schema. No markdown. The first 100 words of intro must declare the page topic unambiguously. FAQ answers must be standalone and citable. H1 must match the target keyword exactly. H2/H3 expand topical coverage without restating H1. Use market-specific terminology, measurements, and currency from LOCALE context.
